title: PingList
description: A minimal minecraft fabric mod to display numerical ping values instead of the usual connection bars.
body:
# PingList
PingList is a single mixin Fabric mod that changes how the connection icon in the player tab-list appears. Replacing it with a colour coded, numerical value instead of the infamously vague connection bar icon, it is much easier for players to understand what kind of connection they have to the server, as well as view other players' connections. It requires no configuration and no dependencies, other than the Fabric loader itself (that's right, not even Fabric API!)

![PingList Demo on Hypixel Server](https://i.imgur.com/QddmyPy.png)
